generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application storing crane state data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for architectural visualization using C4 Model"

]

instance ContainerizationTechnology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeAndHistoricalDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control using GitHub repositories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven engineering for system evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization model using context and container diagrams for software components and interactions"

]

instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with controller for research and educational applications"
]

]

]

instance RealTimeAndHistoricalDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for real-time and historical data visualization"
]

]

instance BehavioralAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Control Application (Python) are transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane hardware, though specific command formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, incorporating containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment. It follows an ad-hoc approach without utilizing a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The MQTT Broker facilitates signaling between all digital twin services using the MQTT protocol. Network topology details, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not explicitly described in the document."
